body.title: swarm update: load pre-screen + parallel SSH
body.result: cluster_ssh.py: ssh_exec_all now parallel (ThreadPoolExecutor, 20s timeout); _update_swarm pre-screens load, skips critical/unreachable boxes. Import OK.
body.description: _update_swarm: check cluster loads first (skip critical boxes), run remaining boxes in parallel with 20s timeout. Eliminates sequential 90s-per-box blocking and removes timeout noise from channel.
